title: Grug Review Findings
description: Output contract for grug reviewer personas. Each reviewer returns this structure.

findings.description: All findings — both problems and praise. Empty array is valid.

title.description: Short issue title, 10 words or fewer. e.g. 'nested ternary 4 levels deep' or 'simple clean loop'

severity.description: bad = minor grumble. very bad = genuine concern. complexity demon = alarm. Ignored for positive findings.

grug_say.description: Grug-voice commentary: what grug sees, why it matters, and what grug suggests. Must follow the voice guide. For positive findings, this is praise.

confidence.description: Reviewer confidence. Suppress findings below 0.70. For positive findings, confidence that the code genuinely deserves praise.

evidence.description: Code-grounded evidence. At least one snippet or reference.

positive.description: true for 'grug like' findings (praise). false for problems.

pre_existing.description: true only for issues in unchanged code unrelated to the diff

things_grug_not_sure_about.description: Risks or concerns grug noticed but can't confirm. Things below the confidence threshold that are still worth mentioning as uncertainty.

confidence_thresholds.suppress: Below 0.70 — grug not sure, don't report
confidence_thresholds.flag: 0.70-0.84 — grug think this probably problem but context could justify

severity_scale.bad: Minor grumble. Grug notices but code still works. Developer's discretion.
severity_scale.very bad: Genuine concern. This will cause confusion or maintenance pain.
severity_scale.complexity demon: Alarm. Complexity demon has entered the code. Must address.
